title: Dragon Egg Dupe
description: Makes it posible to dupe dragon eggs with dragon scales.
body:
# What is this mod about?
This mod pack makes the Ender Dragon drop a scale every time you kill it. These scales can be a valuable resource, especially for players who are looking to craft powerful and unique items. 

# Gobber
While the mod is used the most for those using [Gobber](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gobber), especially for those interested in crafting the highly overpowerd Dragon Armor. The scales serve as a key component in the crafting process, making this mod an essential addition for players who want to consistently obtain this rare material and fully take advantage of the advanced features Gobber has to offer. Whether you're an adventurer focused on powerful armor or a collector of rare materials.

# Credits
Thanks to [GabGabbe](https://modrinth.com/user/Gabgabbe), the creator of the mod, and thanks to [Sillen](https://modrinth.com/user/Sillen) for making the Dragon Scale texture.
